name: Roughly how much is my broken leg from work worth in Utah?

mainEntity.name: Roughly how much is my broken leg from work worth in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Covers medical/wages; value via bills, lost pay, disability.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Value depends on medical costs, lost wages (2/3 average weekly), disability duration, but no pain/suffering from employer.[1] Serious cases add future earnings loss.[1] Key factors: Total wages, treatment needs, impairment rating; third-party suits add noneconomic damages uncapped.[1] Practical guidance: Track all bills/expenses, avoid early low settlements, and use a lawyer for accurate valuation. Settlements vary widely by case facts.

description: Covers medical/wages; value via bills, lost pay, disability.[1]
